title: Seldom Different
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Drake.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A stormtrooper shoots Drake Paulsen aboard the ''Seldom Different''.]]
The '''''Seldom Different''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] that belonged to [[Abdi-Badawzi]]. It was boarded by the [[Inquisitor (Star Destroyer)|''Inquisitor'']] around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]]. [[Elias Halbert]] was in command of the ship at that time.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Out of the Cradle|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
